description_long: This object consists of two milkshakes served in distinct glass cups, both placed on a round, dark serving tray. The left milkshake is pink, presented in a curvy goblet-style glass with a red cherry and a pink straw, as well as a yellow stirrer. The right milkshake is green, served in a taller, more conical glass with a green lime slice garnish and a white straw. Both glasses have a translucent appearance and are supported by short, wide stems and bases. The tray beneath them is circular, dark, and slightly reflective, providing a stable platform for the drinks. The overall presentation is festive and visually appealing, suitable for a café or outdoor urban setting.
description: Two colorful milkshakes, one pink and one green, are served in elegant glass cups with garnishes and straws, placed on a round dark tray.
description_view_0: The pink milkshake is in the foreground, partially obscuring the green milkshake behind it, both on a dark tray.
description_view_1: Both milkshakes are fully visible side by side, showing their distinct garnishes and cup shapes clearly.
description_view_2: The green milkshake is prominent, with the pink milkshake mostly hidden behind it, both on the tray.
description_view_3: The green milkshake is in the foreground, with the pink milkshake to the right, both clearly visible on the tray.
attribute_cup_type: goblet glass and conical parfait glass
